data.info-lumos_training-welcome_description: First you'll complete a short training course to learn the basics of conducting your study with Medable. After you're done, you will be given instant access.
data.info-lumos_training-welcome_title: Welcome to Medable for Sites! We know managing different systems can be complex, and we value your contribution to the success of every study and the support you provide to participants.
data.info-participant-email_acknowledgment: Participant acknowledges email address may be used for study-related communications.

data.info-participant_caregiver-empty: There are no caregivers for this participant.
data.info-participant_deactivation-confirmati: By entering the Participant ID below, you are confirming deactivation of this participant and they will no longer have access to this study. This cannot be undone.

data.info-participant_invite-email_required: Please enter an email for the participant before sending invite codes.

data.info-password_reset-description: This will replace the user's password with temporary password and cannot be undone
data.info-password_reset-temp_password: Please share the following temporary password with the user:
data.info-pi_oversight-no_recent_data: There are no recent visits, data change requests, or activity responses to review for this participant. No further action is required for this participant based on current data.
data.info-pi_oversight-no_summary_generated: Summary service is unavailable, Principal Investigator has received and reviewed relevant participant data since that last sign-off
data.info-pi_oversight-summary-generated_by: This summary was generated automatically by the Medable Principal Investigator Signature Agent on {date}. It includes only the data currently stored within the Medable system and does not capture all patient information.
data.info-pi_oversight_table-empty: There are no Principal Investigator oversights
data.info-qr_code-sync_instruction: To sync data to Medable and prepare a provisioned device for a new participant, scan the QR code using the device's camera.

data.info-study_training-directions: Training material is always available in Help and resources.
data.info-study_training-instructions: Please review the review study training and acknowledge completion. Once completed, you can access this material anytime in Help and resources.
data.info-user_training_reports-description: Review the training completion records for all site users in this workspace.

data.label-participant-description_without_em: Creating an account without an email means:
Password Resets: The participant must contact the study site for help.
eSignature disabled: The participant will not be able to sign digitally.
Communications: All study messages will be sent through the site.
